meta.title: PortMix SA | Bespoke Interior Joinery in Western Switzerland
meta.description: Made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets — designed, built and installed by the same team. Family business since 2017. Showroom in Echandens, branch in Geneva.
meta.descriptionAbout: From a family workshop in 2017 to a showroom in Echandens: the story of PortMix SA, founded by Nasuf Biljibani.
meta.titleServices: Made-to-Measure Doors, Wardrobes & Walk-in Closets | PortMix SA

meta.titleRealisations: Projects | Bespoke Joinery in Vaud & Geneva
meta.descriptionRealisations: Villas, apartments and offices across Western Switzerland: discover our made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets by PortMix SA.

hero.subtitle: Made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets — designed, built and installed by the same team. A Swiss family business, since 2017.

home.introTitle: A family story, a Swiss standard
home.introText: It all began in 2017, with two hands and one conviction: that honest work can build something that lasts. Today, PortMix SA designs, manufactures and installs made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets — with the same dedication and passion as on day one.
home.servicesTitle: Everything that dresses and elevates your interiors
home.servicePortesText: Interior, sliding, technical and fire-rated doors — every wood species, every finish, installed to the millimetre.
home.serviceArmoiresText: Made-to-measure wardrobes and built-in closets that use every centimetre and integrate perfectly with your architecture.
home.serviceDressingsText: Exceptional walk-in closets designed around your daily life: noble materials, integrated lighting, intelligent layout.
home.showroomText: Our Echandens showroom presents our doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets at full scale. Compare materials, finishes and mechanisms — and leave with precise ideas for your project.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about it. We advise you with no obligation, at your home or in our showroom.

about.title: A story of family and hard work
storyLead: Some stories are born with means.
Others are born with a conviction.
storyParagraphs: In 2017, PortMix came into being with no capital, no reputation, no certainty other than this: honest work, carried out with rigour, always finds its place.

Nasuf Biljibani started from almost nothing. He carried with him only his trade, patiently learned, a love of work done well, and the will to build something that reflected who he was — a project that would carry his name, but above all, the values he wanted to pass on to his family.

The first projects were modest. Yet each was carried out with the same commitment. A door, a wardrobe, a walk-in closet: no piece of work was ever considered more important than another. Because behind every order stands a person placing their trust in you.
storyParagraphs2: The hand grows steadier. Experience sharpens the eye. Clients return, then tell others about PortMix. What was once a workshop gradually becomes a company recognised for the quality of its work, its reliability, and the care given to the smallest details.

Today, PortMix has a showroom in Echandens and a branch in Geneva. This growth is no coincidence. It is the result of thousands of hours of work, sometimes difficult choices, often invisible sacrifices, and a standard that has never wavered.
storyList: Every door is fitted with precision.
Every wardrobe is built to last.
Every walk-in closet is designed as a one-of-a-kind piece.
And every finish receives the same care, even when it will only ever be noticed by the person who made it.
about.storyQualityLine: Because quality isn't measured only by what can be seen. It is also found in everything that remains invisible.
about.familyIntro: But above all, PortMix is a family story.
familyParagraphs: The story of a couple who built their company together, day after day, with patience, courage and determination.

The story of three children who grew up to the rhythm of the workshops, the smell of wood, plans spread out on the table, and conversations that, more often than not, were about work as much as the future.
familyEmphasis: Every effort pursued the same goal: to build far more than a company.
about.familyClosingParagraph: Not a legacy made of walls or machines, but of values.
valuesLines: A love of work well done.
And the conviction that what is built with the heart can stand the test of time.
about.storyClosing: The rest belongs to those who will write the next chapter of this story.
about.value1Text: Noble materials, careful manufacturing, millimetre-precise installation. We only deliver what we would be proud to have in our own homes.
about.value2Text: No imposed catalogue: every door, wardrobe and walk-in closet is designed for your space and your habits.
about.value3Text: Nasuf and his wife built everything together; to this day, the company is run with that same personal standard — so that every client is treated like family.
about.teamText: The people who bring this story to life every day, from first idea to final installation.

services.title:
From consulting to installation,
one single team
services.intro: We design, manufacture and install all of your interior fittings across Western Switzerland. One point of contact, one standard of excellence, from the first sketch to the final adjustment.
services.portesText: Classic or flush interior doors, sliding doors, technical, fire-rated or acoustic doors: we supply and install every type of door, in every wood species and with every finish. Frames included, with adjustments to the millimetre.
services.portesF4: All wood species, lacquers and finishes
services.armoiresText: Wardrobes that perfectly hug your walls, sloped ceilings and niches. Every centimetre is optimised, every front designed to blend harmoniously into your interior — from clean, minimalist style to warm classic elegance.
services.dressingsText: The walk-in closet is where made-to-measure truly comes into its own. We design it around your wardrobe and your lifestyle: integrated LED lighting, soft-close drawers, noble materials and a layout considered down to the smallest detail.
services.step1Text: At your home or in the showroom: we listen, take measurements and advise you with no obligation.
services.step2Text: Precise plans and visuals, choice of materials and finishes, detailed and transparent quote.
services.step3Text: Careful manufacturing to Swiss standards, with quality control at every step.
services.step4Text: Our installation team works cleanly and on schedule, down to the final adjustment.

realisations.title: The result speaks for us
realisations.intro: A glimpse of our projects across Western Switzerland — delivered for general contractors, developers and architects who trust us site after site.
realisations.showroomText: Our Echandens showroom displays doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets in a real setting. Make an appointment — we will show you around personally.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Call us, write to us or visit the showroom: we respond quickly and advise you with no obligation.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to us directly at info@portmix.ch.

footer.tagline: Exceptional interiors — made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets in Western Switzerland.
